zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Cormeilles於1120年之前出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾塔林頓時，他的父親Thurstan de Cormeilles58歲，母親Wife Thurstan de Cormeilles46歲。他於大約1145年與Beatrix de Cormeilles (de Camerarius)在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1176年9月在英國賀福爾塔林頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾包特利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Cormeilles was born before 1120, in Tarrington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thurstan de Cormeilles, was 58 and his mother, Wife Thurstan de Cormeilles, was 46. He married Beatrix de Cormeilles (de Camerarius) about 1145, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in September 1176, in Tarrington, Herefordshire, England, and was buried in Pauntley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Cormeilles est né avant 1120, à Tarrington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thurstan de Cormeilles, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Wife Thurstan de Cormeilles, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Cormeilles (de Camerarius) environ 1145, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en septembre 1176, à Tarrington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Pauntley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Cormeillesが1120年以前にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアターリントンで生まれた時，父Thurstan de Cormeillesは58歳，母Wife Thurstan de Cormeillesは46歳であった。約1145年にイギリスイギリスでBeatrix de Cormeilles (de Camerarius)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1176年9月にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアターリントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアプアウントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Cormeilles(이)가 1120년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 터아링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurstan de Cormeilles(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Wife Thurstan de Cormeilles(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Beatrix de Cormeilles (de Camerarius)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1176년 9월 영국 허퍼드실르 터아링턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 파운틀리에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Cormeilles (de Camerarius) aproximadamente 1145, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Cormeilles родился перед 1120 г. в местности таррингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thurstan de Cormeilles было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Wife Thurstan de Cormeilles, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Cormeilles (de Camerarius) около 1145 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер сентябрь 1176 г. в местности таррингтон, хирефордшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности паунтли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
